title: Bronze Santa's Magic Key Kit Father Christmas Eve Tradition No Chimney Handmade with Double-sided Wooden Plaque and Envelope Christmas Eve Box Fillers for Kids
features: 【What You'll Get?】: You will receive 1 Santa's magic key of bronze colour, 1 pc double-sided Santa's wooden plaque sign and 1 pc red envelope. A complete set of Father Christmas key set, convenient for you to give your child as the Christmas gift

【Unique Santa's Key Set Design】: We used the shape of a bronze vintage magic key for the design and paired it with a wooden plaque sign from Santa Claus. Starting from his point of view, informs children to keep the key safe so that Santa can use it to open the door and release gifts on Christmas Eve

【Size】: The Christmas magic key measures 8*3cm (3*1.2 inches), the customised Christmas magic key sign plaque measures 10*6cm (3.9*2.4 inches) and comes with a 16.2*11.4cm (6.4*4.5 inches) envelope large enough for you to fit the magic plaque & key set

【Material】: Christmas vintage Santa's magic key is made of high-quality stainless steel material, making the whole look more magical, as if Santa Claus is already knocking on the door to prepare gifts

【Wide Applications】: Children believe in the existence of Santa Claus, give this magic key set to children, let us parents act as Santa to satisfy the children's magical dream~ Let the children feel the warmth of Santa Claus
description: Package Contains: 1 * Bronze vintage Father Christmas magic key. 1 Piece double-sided Santa's Magic Key wooden sign plaque. 1 Piece Red envelope for decorate the magic key set. Perfect Christmas Gifts for Kids: Starting from Santa Claus point of view, informs children to keep the key safe so that Santa can use it to open the door and release gifts on Christmas Eve~ Specifications: Key colour: Bronze. Size: Vintage Father Christmas key: 8*3cm (3*1.2 inches); Santa magic key wooden plaque sign: 10*6cm (3.9*2.4 inches); red envelope: 16.2*11.4cm (6.4*4.5 inches). Material: High-quality stainless steel & paper.
